description_long: This object is a compact, pump-action shotgun with a short barrel and a pistol grip, commonly used for close-quarters situations. The main body is constructed from matte black metal, with a ribbed wooden fore-end that serves as the pump mechanism. The barrel is relatively short and features a tubular magazine beneath it, both made of metal. The pistol grip is ergonomically shaped and appears to be made of a synthetic polymer, providing a secure hold. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, enclosing the trigger for safety. The overall design is utilitarian, emphasizing durability and ease of handling in urban environments.
description: A compact, pump-action shotgun with a short barrel, black metal body, ribbed wooden pump, and a pistol grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the ribbed wooden pump, short barrel, and pistol grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the pump and magazine tube.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the profile with clear visibility of the pump and grip details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the pistol grip and the back of the receiver, with the barrel and pump receding.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a tubular magazine beneath; no visible ribbing or venting on the barrel.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement.
